scripts.sync: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter contracts sync
scripts.deploy:local: cross-env SEED=true pnpm --filter contracts run deploy
scripts.dev:stack: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8545 && pnpm run deploy:local && pnpm run dev:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n chain,stack -c blue,green "pnpm run node" "pnpm run dev:stack"
scripts.build: pnpm run compile && pnpm --filter transcrypt-frontend build
scripts.verify: pnpm run test:contracts && pnpm run test:frontend && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build
scripts.demo:check: pnpm run check:env && pnpm run verify
scripts.deploy:backend: supabase functions deploy && supabase db push
